category:
Category: Tax

Explanation: This document appears to be a reconciliation bill focused heavily on tax-related matters, with Title VII specifically dedicated to tax provisions including extensions of tax credits, deductions, and rate modifications. The detailed table of contents shows multiple tax-related sections under the Finance subtitle.

extracted_info.title: Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2025
extracted_info.scope: Federal tax code modifications and reforms
key_requirements: Implement new immigration fees and border security measures
Implement new tax provisions and credits
New tax treatment for tips and overtime income
Modify student loan programs and Pell Grant eligibility
Permanent extension of reduced tax rates from Tax Cuts and Jobs Act

metrics.description: New standard deduction for married filing jointly
New standard deduction for single filers
Maximum annual deduction for qualified tips

key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Implement new tip income reporting requirements

reporting_requirements.description: Annual reporting for Qualified Opportunity Funds
reporting_requirements.format: Form to be prescribed by Secretary

monetary_thresholds.description: AGI threshold for phase-out of tip deduction - single filers
AGI threshold for phase-out of tip deduction - joint filers

phased_milestones: Most provisions effective for tax years beginning after 2024/2025
Some international provisions phased in over multiple years

notes: Represents major reform and permanent extension of 2017 tax law changes
Contains significant modifications to international tax regime
Includes new incentives for domestic manufacturing and production
